quote: “In the realm of hunger, the world is prosaic, the full moon seems like a scorched bread”
quoteExplanation: – Sukanta Bhattacharya What did he mean by this line? He wanted to convey that to a hungry person, the beauty of earthly life is meaningless. There is no alternative but to provide a person with their basic rights for them to live a normal life.
belief: We believe that every human being has the right to live with their basic rights. Our foundation started its journey in 2017 with a firm determination to improve the living standards of the 20.5% of Bangladesh’s population who live below the poverty line and to realize the vision of Father of the Nation, Bangabandhu Sheikh Mujibur Rahman, to build a hunger-free Golden Bengal.
request: Your interest and cooperation in our humble effort are greatly appreciated. We await your participation in this journey to build the Golden Bengal of our dreams.
